status: SEED / n=3 / UNDERPOWERED (recall-only; no secure/negative decode rows yet)
protocol: blind, code-only, no-advisory-lookup clean-room; undirected naive vs decode-completeness-forcing-function method; non-LLM label scoring

findings.naive: secure (MISS, reached stub but ruled out bypass)

score_n3.interpretation: On this n=3 positive-only seed the method out-detects naive, BUT the entire edge is on the 2 SUBTLE cases (naive reaches the decode and rules it out); on the 1 eyeball-able case (Debita expo) naive also catches it. The method's value is specifically subtlety, not a blanket method>naive.

honesty_caveats: UNDERPOWERED: n=3 << MIN_SLICE_N=10. 3 findings is suggestive, NOT a calibrated rate. admission.py mechanically blocks promotion to a scored slice.

RECALL-ONLY: all 3 rows are POSITIVES. There are NO secure/negative decode rows yet (a correct decode that looks droppable). So PRECISION / FP-rate is UNMEASURED -- the method flagged vuln on all 3, and we cannot yet see whether it over-flags correct decodes. The decode corpus needs secure siblings before any precision claim (this is the authz_v1 secure-twin discipline, not yet applied to decode).
ANTI-SURVIVORSHIP: the Debita control was included deliberately as a real decode bug where naive is NOT fooled, so the corpus is not cherry-picked to method-wins (disqualifier #9).
CONTAMINATION: clean-room agents were blind/code-only/no-web; a first Monetrix naive run was discarded for a leaked-direction prompt (see run_2026-06-09.json).

COMMODITIZATION WATCH (NORTH_STAR): the method edge is the systematic field-enumeration discipline; track whether a future naive frontier call starts doing it spontaneously. On Kora the naive even located the dropped fields and still ruled it secure -- the discipline gap, not a knowledge gap.

GROWTH: the strict subtle-decode class is RARE in public disclosures (the corpus-hunt workflow ruthlessly cut almost everything). Reaching n>=10 is a multi-session program; the most productive vein found = HyperEVM/HyperCore precompile-read integrators (the spot-balance tuple's value-reducing 'hold' leg is a likely sibling pattern).
next: Add SECURE/negative decode rows (correct decodes that look field-droppable) to enable precision/FP measurement.
Grow positives toward n>=10 via the reusable decode-corpus-hunt workflow; verify each evidence_date (Kora/Debita advisory publish dates).
Only THEN register decode_v1 in SLICES.md + ship a naive baseline in the same commit + pass L4 admission.
